text: Researcher @OpenAI, core member of the GPT Image research team. PhD @MIT EECS. I do world models, RL, and robotics. Website: boyuan.space. 1.2万 followers. 408 posts.
notes: Profile anchors Boyuan as OpenAI GPT Image research core member with world-model/RL/robotics background.

text: We are committed to continually improving the GPT Image 2 model! I am actively fixing various issues from the community feedback. Just reply or DM me your GPT conversation! Features like 2K or 4K images are already available via the experimental API. Hope you enjoy the model!
notes: Core signal: direct researcher feedback channel and experimental API features for high-resolution images.

text: If there is one secret recipe about GPT Image 2, it must be codex. In the last 6 months, codex has been zero-shoting every single prompt I tried. GPT Image 2 is 99% coded by codex. The codex team is integrating image gen into the ecosystem for more agentic capabilities, hope you enjoy!
notes: High-value Codex signal: GPT Image 2 implementation and prompt experimentation linked to Codex.

text: During my @OpenAI livestream yesterday, I generated this pile of rice with an easter egg. A single grain in it has "GPT Image 2" engraved. Can you find the grain? I spent a lot of time improving the text rendering of this model and it paid off!
notes: Text rendering and tiny visual detail as model-quality benchmark.

text: From MIT to OpenAI, Kiwhan is a master of coding and prompting(for images as well!) I had a fun time creating a lot of Korean text with Kiwhan. Wish I could post that Korean manga I made about him!
notes: Multilingual text generation and image prompting as model capability signal.

text: GPT Image can nail your infographics creation with minimal prompt. Yuguang in our team spent a lot of time improving the infographics ability. Please also check out his official demo video!
notes: Infographics and slide-style image sequences for researcher communication.
